import React from 'react'; import './PortfolioPage.css'; import { portfolioData } from '../data/portfolioData'; const skillGroups = [ { title: 'Programming Languages', key: 'languages' }, { title: 'Frontend', key: 'frontend' }, { title: 'Backend', key: 'backend' }, { title: 'Databases', key: 'databases' }, { title: 'Tools & Platforms', key: 'tools' }, { title: 'Core CS', key: 'fundamentals' }, ]; const PortfolioPage = ({ theme }) => { return (

))}

))}

); }; export default PortfolioPage;
